name: mysql-operator
postCreateCommand: export MINIKUBE_IP=$(getent hosts minikube | awk '{ print $1 }') && ip route add 10.244.0.0/16 via $MINIKUBE_IP && ip route add 10.96.0.0/12 via $MINIKUBE_IP && echo 'nameserver $MINIKUBE_IP' > /etc/resolv.conf && echo 'search social-networks.svc.cluster.local svc.cluster.local cluster.local' >> /etc/resolv.conf && echo 'options ndots:5' >> /etc/resolv.conf && npm install
